mapping_description: SPAKEERU: mapping to load data from CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RECOMMIT_DATA to the table ST_CG1_XSCM_PL_PBM_RECMIT_DATA

attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT CG.MESSAGE_ID, CG.ORGANIZATION_CODE, CG.ORDER_NUMBER, CG.SHIP_SET_NUMBER, CG.LINE_NUMBER, CG.PID, CG.ORDER_DATE_TYPE_CODE, CG.IMPROVED_TANS, CG.CURRENT_SSD, CG.RECOMMENDED_SSD, CG.CURRENT_SAD, CG.NEW_SAD, CG.CURRENT_PDATE, CG.SUGGESTED_PDATE, CG.RECOMMIT_REASON, CG.CISCO_DETAIL_RECOMMIT_REASON, CG.PULL_IN_QUANTITY, CG.PULL_IN_COMMENTS, CG.AMP_USER_NAME, CG.PROCESS_STATUS, CG.ERROR_CODE, CG.ERROR_MESSAGE, CG.TRANSMISSION_DATE, CG.OLD_PDATE_FISCAL_WEEK, CG.NEW_PDATE_FISCAL_WEEK, CG.TRANS_DATE_FISCAL_WEEK, CG.SHIP_SET_STATUS, CG.SECONDARY_PRIORITY, CG.SS_DAYS_IMPROVED, CG.RECOMMIT_DATE, CG.LAST_UPDATE_DATE, CG.CREATED_BY, CG.CREATION_DATE, CG.REQUEST_ID, CG.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN, CG.LAST_UPDATED_BY, CG.ATTRIBUTE1, CG.ATTRIBUTE2, CG.ATTRIBUTE3, CG.ATTRIBUTE4, CG.ATTRIBUTE5, CG.ATTRIBUTE6, CG.ATTRIBUTE7, CG.ATTRIBUTE8, CG.ATTRIBUTE9, CG.ATTRIBUTE10, CG.ATTRIBUTE11, CG.ATTRIBUTE12, CG.ATTRIBUTE13, CG.ATTRIBUTE14, CG.ATTRIBUTE15, CG.ATTRIBUTE16, CG.ATTRIBUTE17, CG.ATTRIBUTE18, CG.ATTRIBUTE19, CG.ATTRIBUTE20 , 
'CG' GLOBAL_NAME , CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0),SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME
FROM
   $$NRTACCUMVWDB.CG1_XXSCM_PL_PBM_RECOMMIT_DATA CG
 WHERE
CG.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME > '$$lastextractdate'
AND
CG.SOURCE_DML_TYPE <> 'DELETE'
QUALIFY ROW_NUMBER() OVER (PARTITION BY  CG.MESSAGE_ID, CG.ORDER_NUMBER, CG.LINE_NUMBER ORDER BY CG.REFRESH_DATETIME DESC) = 1
